sectionEntry.title: Core concepts
sectionEntry.body: The design system is built on three layers: **tokens** carry raw values, **foundations** define design domains, and **components** compose both into UI. Understanding this hierarchy makes everything else easier to navigate.

sections.title: Tokens
sections.body: Tokens are named design values — a color, a spacing step, a duration. Never hard-code a raw value when a token exists.

items.title: What is this design system?
items.body: A shared library of components, tokens, and patterns that keeps every Acme product visually and behaviorally consistent. Use it to build interfaces faster without reinventing the basics.

items.title: Who is it for?
items.body: Product designers and frontend engineers building Acme applications. Designers work from the Figma library; engineers consume the published npm packages.
